name: ocas-taste
description: Behavior-driven taste model built from real consumption signals. Use when the user wants personalized recommendations grounded in actual behavior (purchases, visits, plays, watches), cross-domain discovery, or taste model status. Trigger phrases: 'based on what I like, what else should I try', 'recommend something similar to these restaurants', 'find surprising connections across my tastes'. Do not use for generic search, editorial top-10 lists, or ad-copy generation.
author: Indigo Karasu
